tagline: Incident and escalation leader driving calm, measurable response at enterprise scale through systems thinking and executive communication.
twoPageSummary: Incident management leader with 16+ years of experience directing high-severity response, operational governance, telemetry-led remediation, and global support teams for mission-critical services. Proven record improving MTTR, reducing alert noise, aligning stakeholders in high-pressure situations, and converting recurring incidents into scalable operational improvements.
portfolioSummary: Leadership profile emphasizing major incident command, crisis communication, executive advocacy, service health governance, and global operations leadership.
selectedImpact: Central escalation authority for mission-critical support systems.
Reduced resolution time by 32% through escalation framework redesign.
Remediated 25,000+ stale or false incidents and streamlined 500+ alerts.
Led global teams of up to 32 engineers.
